_comment: Team member name → ClickUp user ID. Sourced from `clickup-pp-cli team --json --compact` on 2026-06-09. Mirrors the Go `teamMembers` map in `.claude/tools/clickup-pp-cli/internal/cli/pm_load.go` (lines 33-47) — keep both in sync, but this JSON is the canonical source for Hermes/skills/agents. Default assignees (Diksha for load, Karra for footage) match the hardcoded `dikshaID` / `karraID` constants in the binary.

notes.michael_starr_81508885: In the Go teamMembers map but NOT returned by the live `team` API on 2026-06-09 — likely deactivated/former. Keep in Go map until confirmed, do not add to this JSON without verification.
notes.inactive_in_pm_load_go: kp is in the live team but only as 'kp' (lowercase, single token). The Go map uses 'kp' as the key directly.

how_to_update: Refresh by running: `clickup-pp-cli team --json --compact | tail -n +2 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(f'{m[\"user\"][\"username\"]} {m[\"user\"][\"id\"]} {m[\"user\"][\"email\"]}') for m in d['results']['teams'][0]['members']]"` and updating the user_ids / emails maps. Re-seed the Go teamMembers map (line 33-47) with the same data (lowercase first name + lowercase first-last) and rebuild the binary with: `go build -C ~/printing-press/library/clickup -o /Users/marce/go/bin/clickup-pp-cli ./cmd/clickup-pp-cli`
